headline: Double Agents: Exposing Security Blind Spots in GCP Vertex AI
summary: This article by Ofir Shaty details security vulnerabilities in Google Cloud Platform's Vertex AI Agent Engine, where a misconfigured AI agent could become a "double agent" to exfiltrate data and compromise infrastructure. The research found that default permissions for the Per-Project, Per-Product Service Agent (P4SA) were overly broad, allowing privileged access to consumer project data and Google's internal resources. Palo Alto Networks collaborated with Google to address these issues, leading to revised documentation and the recommendation to use Bring Your Own Service Account (BYOSA) for enhanced security.
label: neutral
